---
title: "test_expand_thesaurus_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_expand_thesaurus_empire.py"
loc: 23
complexity: 6
logic_score: 2.82
style_score: 4.06
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.20
---

## Intent
The `test_expand_thesaurus_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_thesaurus_expansion_logic, test_thesaurus_script_execution. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_thesaurus_expansion_logic, test_thesaurus_script_execution. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `test_thesaurus_expansion_logic`
- `test_thesaurus_script_execution`
